title: toxicodendron delavayi var. delavayi
intro: Toxicodendron delavayi var. delavayi, also known as the Chinese poison ivy, is a plant species belonging to the Anacardiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of Toxicodendron delavayi var. delavayi include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution should be exercised when handling the plant due to its urushiol oil, which can cause skin irritation and allergic reactions.
